messages: My AC isn't cooling and the house is really hot
My AC is leaking water everywhere
note: trap: 'leaking water' must NOT route to plumbing

messages: My air conditioner won't turn on at all
There's no heat coming from my furnace

My breaker keeps tripping whenever I run the microwave

I'd like to install a new AC unit in my bedroom
note: trap: 'new AC' is installation, not ac_repair

messages: I want to install a new water heater
I can smell gas in my kitchen!

note: trap: furnace=heating, but 'burning' must escalate first
